name: UNEP Mandate 1972 (UN Environment Programme)
summary: The United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UNEP framework established by the UN General Assembly following the Stockholm Conference — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-environment-coordination framework + first UN agency headquartered in the Global South framework (UNEP established 15 December 1972 by UN General Assembly Resolution 2997 XXVII following Stockholm Conference on Human Environment 5-16 June 1972 + UNEP operations began 1972 + UN Environment Assembly UNEA established 2012 elevating UNEP Governing Council framework — formal foundational UNEP framework establishing comprehensive UNEP organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-environment-coordination framework + first UN agency headquartered in the Global South Nairobi Kenya framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Stockholm Conference 1972 + Stockholm+50 2022 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Montreal Protocol 1987 + Kigali Amendment 2016 framework via UNEP Ozone Secretariat framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Multilateral Environmental Agreements MEAs framework via 500+ MEAs framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Convention on Biological Diversity CBD 1992 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework 2022 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations 2022-2026 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal IPBES + IPCC environmental-scientific-assessment framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-environmental-rollbacks 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Triple Planetary Crisis: climate change + biodiversity loss + pollution framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Montreal Protocol 1987 + Kigali Amendment 2016 framework (Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer adopted 16 September 1987 in Montreal Canada + effective 1 January 1989 + Kigali Amendment to Montreal Protocol adopted 15 October 2016 in Kigali Rwanda + effective 1 January 2019 — formal foundational Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Montreal Protocol framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal universal-ratification framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework credited with healing-ozone-layer framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Convention on Biological Diversity CBD 1992 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework 2022 framework (Convention on Biological Diversity CBD adopted 5 June 1992 at UNCED Rio Earth Summit + effective 29 December 1993 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework adopted 19 December 2022 at COP15 Montreal Canada providing formal 30x30 framework: protect 30% of land + sea by 2030 framework — formal foundational CBD + Kunming-Montreal framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-biodiversity framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 30x30 framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework (Intergovernmental Negotiating Committee on Plastic Pollution INC-1 to INC-5.2 2022-2025 + INC-5.2 held 5-14 August 2025 in Geneva Switzerland + INC-5.2 stalled without consensus on production-cap framework + INC-6 planned 2026 framework — formal foundational Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework + first major global environmental treaty stalled by Saudi-Arabia + Iran + Russia + US-Trump-administration coalition framework). The UNEP Mandate is operating upon 193 UNEP member states matching UN membership + 6 UNEP Regional Offices + global coverage framework — comprehensive universal coverage framework. The Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UNEP Triple Planetary Crisis framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-environmental-displacement-of-families framework. The UN Environment Assembly UNEA + UNEP Executive Director + UNEP Secretariat + UNEP Regional Offices are the formal UNEP bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UNEP Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: UNEP Founding Resolution 1972 (UN General Assembly Resolution 2997 XXVII)
statutory_framework.title: UNEP Founding Resolution
statutory_framework.relevance: UNEP established 15 December 1972 by UN General Assembly Resolution 2997 XXVII following Stockholm Conference on Human Environment 5-16 June 1972 — formal foundational UNEP framework establishing comprehensive UNEP organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: Stockholm Declaration
statutory_framework.relevance: Stockholm Declaration on the Human Environment adopted 16 June 1972 at Stockholm Conference on Human Environment — formal foundational Stockholm Declaration framework.

statutory_framework.title: Montreal Protocol
statutory_framework.relevance: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer adopted 16 September 1987 in Montreal Canada + effective 1 January 1989 — formal foundational Montreal Protocol framework.

statutory_framework.title: Kigali Amendment
statutory_framework.relevance: Kigali Amendment to Montreal Protocol adopted 15 October 2016 in Kigali Rwanda + effective 1 January 2019 — formal foundational Kigali Amendment HFCs phase-down framework.

statutory_framework.title: CBD
statutory_framework.relevance: Convention on Biological Diversity CBD adopted 5 June 1992 at UNCED Rio Earth Summit + effective 29 December 1993 — formal foundational CBD framework.

statutory_framework.title: Kunming-Montreal GBF
statutory_framework.relevance: Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework adopted 19 December 2022 at CBD COP15 Montreal Canada — formal foundational Kunming-Montreal 30x30 biodiversity framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Environment Assembly (UNEA)
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UNEP — established 2012 elevating UNEP Governing Council.

apex_courts.name: UNEP Executive Director
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UNEP — UNEP Executive Director Inger Andersen 2019-2025+ framework.

apex_courts.name: UNEP Regional Offices (6 Regional Offices)
apex_courts.role: Formal UNEP Regional Offices body: Africa + Asia and the Pacific + Europe + Latin America and the Caribbean + North America + West Asia.

anonymisation_convention: UNEP-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN Environment Assembly + UNEP Governing Council; individual communications not formally accepted under UNEP framework.

key_developments.title: Stockholm Conference + UNEP established
key_developments.description: Stockholm Conference on Human Environment held 5-16 June 1972 in Stockholm Sweden + UNEP established 15 December 1972 by UN General Assembly Resolution 2997 XXVII — formal foundational Stockholm Conference + UNEP framework operational.

key_developments.title: Vienna Convention for the Protection of the Ozone Layer
key_developments.description: Vienna Convention for the Protection of the Ozone Layer adopted 22 March 1985 in Vienna Austria — predecessor framework to Montreal Protocol.

key_developments.title: Montreal Protocol adopted
key_developments.description: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer adopted 16 September 1987 in Montreal Canada — formal foundational Montreal Protocol framework adopted.

key_developments.title: Rio Earth Summit + CBD + UNFCCC + Agenda 21
key_developments.description: UNCED Rio Earth Summit held 3-14 June 1992 + CBD signed 5 June 1992 + UNFCCC signed 9 May 1992 + Agenda 21 adopted 14 June 1992 — formal foundational Rio Earth Summit + Three Rio Conventions framework operational.

key_developments.title: Johannesburg World Summit on Sustainable Development
key_developments.description: Johannesburg World Summit on Sustainable Development WSSD held 26 August - 4 September 2002 in Johannesburg South Africa — formal WSSD framework operational.

key_developments.title: Rio+20 + UNEA established + Future We Want
key_developments.description: Rio+20 UN Conference on Sustainable Development held 13-22 June 2012 in Rio de Janeiro Brazil + Future We Want outcome document adopted 27 July 2012 + UN Environment Assembly UNEA established 2012 elevating UNEP Governing Council framework — formal Rio+20 + UNEA + Future We Want framework operational.

key_developments.title: Kigali Amendment + UNEA-2
key_developments.description: Kigali Amendment to Montreal Protocol adopted 15 October 2016 in Kigali Rwanda + UNEA-2 held 23-27 May 2016 in Nairobi Kenya — formal Kigali Amendment + UNEA-2 framework operational.

key_developments.title: Stockholm+50 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework + Plastic Treaty negotiations launched
key_developments.description: Stockholm+50 held 2-3 June 2022 in Stockholm Sweden + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework adopted 19 December 2022 at CBD COP15 Montreal Canada + UN Environment Assembly Resolution 5/14 of 2 March 2022 launching Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework — formal Stockholm+50 + Kunming-Montreal + Plastic Treaty negotiations framework operational.

key_developments.title: INC-5.2 Plastic Treaty negotiations stalled + Trump-environmental-rollbacks
key_developments.description: INC-5.2 Plastic Treaty negotiations held 5-14 August 2025 in Geneva Switzerland + INC-5.2 stalled without consensus on production-cap framework + Trump-administration-environmental-rollbacks 2025 framework — formal INC-5.2 stalled + Trump-environmental-rollbacks framework operational.

structural_findings: UNEP Mandate operates a supranational global framework — places UNEP Mandate in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-environment-coordination framework + first UN agency headquartered in the Global South framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-environment-coordination framework + first UN agency headquartered in the Global South Nairobi Kenya framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Stockholm Conference 1972 + Stockholm+50 2022 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Montreal Protocol 1987 + Kigali Amendment 2016 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Multilateral Environmental Agreements MEAs framework via 500+ MEAs framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal CBD 1992 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework 2022 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations 2022-2026 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal IPBES + IPCC environmental-scientific-assessment framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-environmental-rollbacks 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Triple Planetary Crisis: climate change + biodiversity loss + pollution framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Montreal Protocol 1987 + Kigali Amendment 2016 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Montreal Protocol framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal universal-ratification framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework credited with healing-ozone-layer framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal CBD 1992 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework 2022 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-biodiversity framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 30x30 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations framework + first major global environmental treaty stalled by Saudi-Arabia + Iran + Russia + US-Trump-administration coalition framework.
193 UNEP member state ratification framework matching UN membership + 6 UNEP Regional Offices is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive universal coverage framework.

1972 Stockholm + UNEP + 1985 Vienna Convention + 1987 Montreal + 1992 Rio + CBD + UNFCCC + Agenda 21 + 2002 Johannesburg + 2012 Rio+20 + UNEA + 2016 Kigali + UNEA-2 + 2022 Stockholm+50 + Kunming-Montreal + Plastic Treaty launched + 2025 INC-5.2 stalled + Trump-rollbacks UNEP-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UNEP Mandate + Stockholm Declaration + Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment + CBD + Kunming-Montreal + Plastic Treaty + UNEA formal octet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-environmental-displacement-of-families framework.
editorial_notes: UNEP Mandate jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-environment-coordination foundational-UNEP meta-framework (UNEP Founding Resolution 1972 + Stockholm Declaration 1972 + Montreal Protocol 1987/1989 + Kigali Amendment 2016/2019 + Vienna Convention 1985 + CBD 1992/1993 + Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework 2022 + Plastic Treaty negotiations INC-1 to INC-5.2 2022-2025 + 1972 Stockholm Conference + 1992 Rio + UNFCCC + Agenda 21 + 2002 Johannesburg + 2012 Rio+20 + UNEA + 2022 Stockholm+50 + 2025 INC-5.2 stalled + Trump-rollbacks). Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-environment-coordination framework + first UN agency headquartered in the Global South Nairobi Kenya + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Montreal Protocol 1987 + Kigali Amendment 2016 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal CBD 1992 + Kunming-Montreal 2022 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations 2022-2026 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal IPBES + IPCC environmental-scientific-assessment + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-environmental-rollbacks 2025 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Triple Planetary Crisis: climate change + biodiversity loss + pollution + central jurisdiction of formal Montreal Protocol universal-ratification credited with healing-ozone-layer + central jurisdiction of formal CBD + Kunming-Montreal 30x30 framework + central jurisdiction of formal Global Plastic Treaty negotiations stalled by Saudi-Arabia + Iran + Russia + US-Trump-administration coalition + 193 UNEP member states matching UN membership + 6 UNEP Regional Offices + UNEP Headquartered Nairobi + UNEP Executive Director Inger Andersen 2019-2025 + 1972 Stockholm + UNEP + 1985 Vienna Convention + 1987 Montreal + 1992 Rio + CBD + UNFCCC + Agenda 21 + 2002 Johannesburg + 2012 Rio+20 + UNEA + 2016 Kigali + UNEA-2 + 2022 Stockholm+50 + Kunming-Montreal + Plastic Treaty launched + 2025 INC-5.2 stalled + Trump-rollbacks UNEP-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: UNEP Triple Planetary Crisis framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-environmental-displacement-of-families framework.
